flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Scioto County Career Technical Center rose 133% between 2021 and 2024 (75 → 175).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Scioto County Career Technical Center fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Scioto County Career Technical Center rose 54% between 2006 and 2009 (45.8% → 70.4%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Scioto County Career Technical Center rose 35% between 2006 and 2009 (61.0% → 82.4%).
